name: Time Thief Adjuster
name_jp: クロノダイバー・アジャスター
desc: If you Normal or Special Summon a "Time Thief" monster(s), except "Time Thief Adjuster" (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can send 1 "Time Thief" card from your Deck to the GY, except "Time Thief Adjuster". You can only use 1 "Time Thief Adjuster" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
mnst_eff: If you Normal or Special Summon a "Time Thief" monster(s), except "Time Thief Adjuster" (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can send 1 "Time Thief" card from your Deck to the GY, except "Time Thief Adjuster". You can only use 1 "Time Thief Adjuster" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: If you Normal or Special Summon a "Time Thief" monster(s), except "Time Thief Adjuster" (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can send 1 "Time Thief" card from your Deck to the GY, except "Time Thief Adjuster". You can only use 1 "Time Thief Adjuster" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
